SEARCH
Package project_biu.server

Class MyHTTPServer

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Thread
project_biu.server.MyHTTPServer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable, HTTPServer
public class MyHTTPServer extends Thread implements HTTPServer
A minimal homemade HTTP server.

MyHTTPServer extends Thread, so calling Thread.start() (declared on HTTPServer too) runs the accept loop on a background thread. Incoming connections are handed to a bounded ExecutorService so that requests are served concurrently but the server never opens more than nThreads worker threads.

Servlets are looked up by longest URI prefix, not exact match: a servlet registered at /app/ therefore handles /app/index.html, while one registered at /publish handles /publish?topic=A. This matches the convention the project's later exercises rely on.

  • Constructor Details

    • MyHTTPServer

      public MyHTTPServer(int port, int nThreads)
      Constructs the server; call start() to begin accepting connections.
      Parameters:
      port - TCP port to listen on
      nThreads - worker pool size for handling concurrent requests

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start()
      Overridden so callers can safely connect to the server the instant start() returns. We open the ServerSocket and the worker pool synchronously here, then start the background accept loop via Thread.start().
      Specified by:
      start in interface HTTPServer
      Overrides:
      start in class Thread

    • addServlet

      public void addServlet(String httpCommanmd, String uri, Servlet s)
      Description copied from interface: HTTPServer
      Register s to handle requests whose verb is httpCommanmd and whose URI starts with uri. Subsequent calls with the same (verb, URI) pair replace the previous mapping.
      Specified by:
      addServlet in interface HTTPServer
      Parameters:
      httpCommanmd - HTTP verb to match (e.g. "GET", "POST"); misspelling preserved to match the course skeleton
      uri - URI prefix this servlet should handle (longest-prefix match wins at dispatch time)
      s - the servlet that will receive matching requests

    • removeServlet

      public void removeServlet(String httpCommanmd, String uri)
      Description copied from interface: HTTPServer
      Unregister whatever servlet is currently mapped at this (verb, URI). A no-op if no such mapping exists.
      Specified by:
      removeServlet in interface HTTPServer
      Parameters:
      httpCommanmd - HTTP verb of the registration to remove
      uri - URI prefix of the registration to remove

    • run

      public void run()
      The accept loop. Times out every second so we can re-check stopped without blocking forever on a quiet socket. Assumes start() has already opened the ServerSocket and created the executor.
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable
      Overrides:
      run in class Thread

    • close

      public void close()
      Description copied from interface: HTTPServer
      Stop the accept loop, shut down workers, and close every registered servlet.
      Specified by:
      close in interface HTTPServer
